description_long: This object is a modular internet cafe setup featuring six individual computer workstations arranged in two rows of three, separated by tall gray partition panels for privacy. Each station is equipped with a black office chair, a desktop computer with dual monitors, a keyboard, and a mouse. The desks are outfitted with shelves and storage compartments containing books, binders, and other office supplies. The partition panels are fabric-covered, providing both acoustic dampening and a modern, professional appearance. The overall color palette is neutral, dominated by shades of gray and black, with blue computer screens adding a subtle accent. The design is functional and space-efficient, suitable for high-density urban environments.
description: A modular internet cafe setup with six computer workstations, gray partition panels, black chairs, and dual-monitor computers arranged in two rows. The design is modern, functional, and space-efficient.
description_view_0: Front view showing three workstations with dual monitors, black chairs, and visible desk accessories, all separated by gray partition panels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the partition panels and the alignment of the workstations in two rows, with chairs tucked under the desks.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the opposite side of the workstations, with visible monitors, chairs, and under-desk storage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, emphasizing the partition thickness and the back of the chairs, with minimal desk accessories visible.
attribute_computer_station_visibility: Six computer stations are clearly visible, arranged in two rows of three, each with dual monitors and black chairs.
